subject: show evpn es output field
old: BondState
new: State
truth: Stop using 'BondState' in 'show evpn es' output; use 'State' instead.
quote: zebra: rename BondState to State in 'show evpn es' output

from_fact: bondstate
state

subject: show bgp advertised-paths output
old: show all advertised paths including non-best paths regardless of addpath
new: show all advertised paths including non-best paths only if addpath is enabled
truth: 'show bgp advertised-paths' no longer shows non-best paths unless addpath is enabled for that peer.
quote: bgpd: Show all advertised paths including non-best paths only if addpath is enabled

from_fact: show all advertised paths including non-best paths regardless of addpath
show all advertised paths including non-best paths only if addpath is enabled

subject: OSPFv3 MTU mismatch adjacency
old: OSPFv3 FULL adjacency persisted despite MTU mismatch
new: OSPFv3 no longer maintains FULL adjacency when MTU mismatch is detected
truth: OSPFv3 FULL adjacency is no longer maintained when an MTU mismatch exists between neighbors.
quote: ospf6d: Fix FULL adjacency persisting despite MTU mismatch

from_fact: ospfv3 full adjacency persisted despite mtu mismatch
ospfv3 no longer maintains full adjacency when mtu mismatch is detected

subject: staticd route config
old: keywords could be used as interface names in static route configuration
new: keywords are rejected as interface names
truth: staticd now rejects keywords (like 'blackhole', 'reject', etc.) when used as interface names in route configuration; you must use a valid interface name instead.
quote: staticd: in route config, reject keywords as ifname

from_fact: keywords could be used as interface names in static route configuration
keywords are rejected as interface names

subject: PIM DR election
old: PIM Designated Router (DR) did not change when the router's address changed
new: PIM DR now changes when the router's address changes
truth: PIM DR election now re-evaluates and changes the DR when a router's address changes, which may alter forwarding paths.
quote: When address change ensure DR changes too.

from_fact: pim designated router (dr) did not change when the router's address changed
pim dr now changes when the router's address changes

subject: pathd
old: segment-routing/traffic-eng always appears in configuration
new: segment-routing/traffic-eng no longer appears in configuration unless explicitly configured
truth: Stop relying on 'segment-routing/traffic-eng' always appearing in the configuration output; it is now only shown when explicitly configured.
quote: pathd: add 'no traffic-eng' command, add test, don't output 'segment-routing/traffic-eng' in configuration always

from_fact: segment-routing/traffic-eng always appears in configuration
segment-routing/traffic-eng no longer appears in configuration unless explicitly configured
routing/traffic

subject: ripd
old: ip rip send/receive version command behavior
new: ip rip send/receive version command behavior fixed
truth: The 'ip rip send/receive version' command behavior has been fixed, which may change which RIP versions are accepted or sent on interfaces that previously relied on the buggy behavior.
quote: ripd: fix ip rip send/receive version command

from_fact: ip rip send/receive version command behavior
ip rip send/receive version command behavior fixed
send/receive

subject: zebra allow-external-route-update
old: configured via CLI/frontend
new: moved to mgmt frontend side
truth: Stop configuring `allow-external-route-update` via the old CLI path; it has been moved to the management frontend side.
quote: zebra: Move `allow-external-route-update` to mgmt frontend side

from_fact: configured via cli/frontend
moved to mgmt frontend side

subject: ospfd/ospf6d directly attached network route installation
old: OSPF installed routes for directly attached networks
new: OSPF no longer installs routes for directly attached networks
truth: Stop relying on OSPF installing routes for directly attached networks; OSPF no longer installs them.
quote: ospfd, ospf6d: do not install routes for directly attached networks

from_fact: ospf installed routes for directly attached networks
ospf no longer installs routes for directly attached networks

subject: pimd sparse-dense mode group handling with RP
old: PIM sparse-dense mode could treat a group as dense even with an RP configured
new: PIM sparse-dense mode now treats a group as sparse if an RP is configured
truth: In PIM sparse-dense mode, if an RP is configured for a group, the group is now treated as sparse (not dense), which may change multicast forwarding behaviour.
quote: pimd: In sparse-dense mode, treat a group as sparse if an RP is configured

from_fact: pim sparse-dense mode could treat a group as dense even with an rp configured
pim sparse-dense mode now treats a group as sparse if an rp is configured

subject: bgpd remote-as per-neighbor override
old: bgpd did not allow overriding remote-as per-neighbor
new: bgpd now allows overriding remote-as per-neighbor
truth: bgpd now allows overriding the remote-as setting on a per-neighbor basis, changing how neighbor AS configuration works.
quote: bgpd: Allow overriding "remote-as" per-neighbor

from_fact: bgpd did not allow overriding remote-as per-neighbor
bgpd now allows overriding remote-as per-neighbor

subject: bgpd: replace-as with confederation
old: replace-as did not replace the actual local-as when used with confederation
new: replace-as now replaces the actual local-as when used with confederation
truth: When using replace-as with confederation, the actual local-as is now replaced; previously it was not, so configurations relying on the old non-replacement behavior will see different AS paths.
quote: bgpd: Replace the actual local-as when using replace-as with the confederation

from_fact: replace-as did not replace the actual local-as when used with confederation
replace-as now replaces the actual local-as when used with confederation

subject: bgpd: honor 'no activate' for dynamic neighbors in peer-group
old: 'no activate' was not honored for dynamic neighbors in a peer-group
new: 'no activate' is now honored for dynamic neighbors in a peer-group
truth: Dynamic neighbors in a peer-group now respect 'no activate'; previously they would activate even when 'no activate' was configured, so existing configs relying on that bypass will stop working.
quote: bgpd: honor 'no activate' for dynamic neighbors in peer-group

from_fact: 'no activate' was not honored for dynamic neighbors in a peer-group
'no activate' is now honored for dynamic neighbors in a peer-group

subject: bgpd
old: BGP route acceptance when confederation AS matches peer AS
new: BGP now does NOT reject the route if confederation AS matches peer AS
truth: BGP no longer rejects routes where the confederation AS matches the peer AS; previously such routes were rejected.
quote: bgpd: Do not reject the route if confederation AS matches peer AS

from_fact: bgp route acceptance when confederation as matches peer as
bgp now does not reject the route if confederation as matches peer as
associative: accept bgp route with confederation as

subject: OSPF Type-5 LSA origination on NSSA routers
old: OSPF NSSA routers could originate Type-5 LSAs directly
truth: OSPF NSSA routers no longer originate Type-5 LSAs directly; they must use Type-7 LSAs instead.
quote: ospfd: eliminate direct origination of Type-5 LSAs on NSSA routers

from_fact: ospf nssa routers could originate type-5 lsas directly
associative: ospf nssa external route not advertised

subject: ospf6d time string parsing
old: allowed negative time strings
new: only positive time strings allowed
truth: ospf6d now rejects negative time strings; only positive time strings are accepted.
quote: ospf6d: only allow positive time strings

from_fact: allowed negative time strings
only positive time strings allowed

subject: BMP AS_PATH handling
old: BMP updates prepended local-AS to AS_PATH
new: BMP updates no longer prepend local-AS to AS_PATH
truth: BMP updates no longer prepend the local-AS to the AS_PATH, which changes the AS_PATH content in BMP monitoring messages.
quote: bgpd: bmp: don't prepend local-AS to AS_PATH in BMP updates

from_fact: bmp updates prepended local-as to as_path
bmp updates no longer prepend local-as to as_path

subject: bfdd
old: show bfd peers brief json output identical to show bfd peers
new: show bfd peers brief json output different from show bfd peers
truth: The JSON output of 'show bfd peers brief' no longer matches 'show bfd peers'; scripts parsing the brief JSON output will break.
quote: bfdd: fix show bfd peers brief json output identical to show bfd peers

from_fact: show bfd peers brief json output identical to show bfd peers
show bfd peers brief json output different from show bfd peers

subject: bgpd LLGR stale route advertisement
old: LLGR stale routes were advertised to non-LLGR peers
new: LLGR stale routes are NOT advertised to non-LLGR peers
truth: Stop relying on LLGR stale routes being sent to non-LLGR peers; they are now suppressed.
quote: bgpd: don't advertise LLGR stale routes to non-LLGR peers

from_fact: llgr stale routes were advertised to non-llgr peers
llgr stale routes are not advertised to non-llgr peers

subject: BGP Labeled Unicast multiple labels
old: If multiple MPLS labels were received, only the bottom label was used
new: Up to 10 labels are supported per prefix
truth: Stop assuming BGP Labeled Unicast only uses the bottom label; up to 10 MPLS labels per prefix are now supported.
quote: Previously: If multiple labels were received, only the bottom label was used. Now: Up to 10 labels are supported per prefix.

from_fact: if multiple mpls labels were received, only the bottom label was used
up to 10 labels are supported per prefix

subject: OSPF SSL1 support
old: OSPF SSL1 support
truth: OSPF no longer supports SSL1; only SSL3 is supported.
quote: ospfd: Drop support for SSL1 and update to SSL3

from_fact: ospf ssl1 support

subject: bgpd
old: Confederation ASNs were placed into AS-SET
new: Confederation ASNs are no longer placed into AS-SET, left as alone
truth: Stop relying on confederation ASNs being placed into AS-SET; they are now left alone and not included in AS-SET.
quote: bgpd: Do not put confederation ASNs into AS-SET, leave them as alone

from_fact: confederation asns were placed into as-set
confederation asns are no longer placed into as-set, left as alone

subject: bgpd
old: 'segment-routing ipv6' enabled by default when 'no segment-routing ipv6' is configured
new: srv6-only command now correctly defaults when 'no segment-routing ipv6' is set
truth: The srv6-only command now correctly defaults when 'no segment-routing ipv6' is configured; previously it may have remained active despite the disable.
quote: Fix srv6-only command defaulted when 'no segment-routing ipv6'

from_fact: 'segment-routing ipv6' enabled by default when 'no segment-routing ipv6' is configured
srv6-only command now correctly defaults when 'no segment-routing ipv6' is set

subject: vtysh CLI length constraint
old: previous CLI line length limit
new: increased CLI line length limit
truth: The vtysh CLI length constraint has been increased, which may break scripts or automation that relied on the previous maximum line length.
quote: increasing vtysh cli length constraint

increased cli line length limit

subject: remoteTransposedSid in JSON output of VPN paths
old: remoteTransposedSid field in JSON output of VPN paths
truth: Stop relying on the remoteTransposedSid field in JSON output of VPN paths; it has been reverted and removed.
quote: Revert "bgpd: add remoteTransposedSid value in json output of vpn paths"

from_fact: remotetransposedsid field in json output of vpn paths

subject: netns command in zebra
old: netns command in zebra
truth: Stop using the netns command in zebra; it has been deprecated and dropped.
quote: zebra: Drop deprecated netns command

from_fact: netns command in zebra

subject: BFD hold timer start condition in bgpd
old: BFD hold timer started regardless of hold-time value
new: BFD hold timer only starts if hold-time is configured (not zero)
truth: BFD hold timer now only starts if hold-time is explicitly configured (non-zero); previously it started unconditionally.
quote: bgpd: Start BFD hold timer ONLY if hold-time is configured (not zero)

from_fact: bfd hold timer started regardless of hold-time value
bfd hold timer only starts if hold-time is configured (not zero)

subject: ripd disabled network update behaviour
old: RIP sends updates on disabled networks
new: RIP does not send updates on disabled networks
truth: RIP no longer sends routing updates on disabled networks; existing configurations relying on updates being sent on disabled networks will silently lose those updates.
quote: ripd: Do not send updates on disabled networks

from_fact: rip sends updates on disabled networks
rip does not send updates on disabled networks

subject: zebra RA lifetime and interval validation
old: zebra accepts any RA lifetime and interval values
new: zebra now checks RA lifetime and interval for validity
truth: Zebra now validates Router Advertisement lifetime and interval values; previously accepted values may now be rejected or cause different behaviour.
quote: zebra: ra lifetime and interval check

from_fact: zebra accepts any ra lifetime and interval values
zebra now checks ra lifetime and interval for validity

subject: ospfd virtual link creation on non-ABRs
old: ospfd allows virtual link creation on non-ABR routers
new: ospfd now correctly rejects virtual link creation on non-ABR routers
truth: OSPF virtual links can no longer be created on non-ABR routers; existing configurations that created virtual links on non-ABRs will now fail.

ospfd now correctly rejects virtual link creation on non-abr routers

subject: zebra CLI max-bw and others missing 'no' versions
old: zebra CLI commands for max-bw and related settings lack 'no' versions
new: zebra CLI now has 'no' versions for max-bw and others
truth: Zebra CLI now supports 'no' forms for max-bw and related commands; existing scripts that used workarounds or different syntax to unset these values may break.
quote: zebra: add CLI 'no' versions for max-bw and others

from_fact: zebra cli commands for max-bw and related settings lack 'no' versions
zebra cli now has 'no' versions for max-bw and others

subject: bgpd
old: sending software-version capability even when explicitly disabled
new: not sending software-version capability when explicitly disabled
truth: The software-version capability is no longer sent if it has been explicitly disabled; previously it might still be sent despite being disabled.
quote: bgpd: Do not send software-version capability if it's disabled explictly by @ton31337 in https://github.com/FRRouting/frr/pull/20281

from_fact: sending software-version capability even when explicitly disabled
not sending software-version capability when explicitly disabled

subject: RIP/RIPng default flush timer
old: RIP/RIPng default flush timer was changed in a prior version
new: RIP/RIPng default flush timer reverted to previous value
truth: The RIP/RIPng default flush timer change has been reverted, restoring the previous timer behavior.
quote: Revert RIP/RIPng default flush timer change

from_fact: rip/ripng default flush timer was changed in a prior version
rip/ripng default flush timer reverted to previous value
rip/ripng

subject: BGP IPv6 Link-Local Capability default
old: enabled by default for datacenter profile
new: disabled by default
truth: Stop relying on BGP IPv6 Link-Local Capability being enabled by default for datacenter profile; it is now disabled by default.
quote: In 10.4.0, this capability was enabled by default for a "datacenter" profile, but it's disabled for 10.5.0 and will be backported to 10.4.2 as well.

from_fact: enabled by default for datacenter profile
disabled by default

subject: BGP RD override behavior
old: Specified RD could be overridden
new: Specified RD is no longer overridden
truth: Stop relying on a user-specified RD being overridden; the specified RD is now preserved.
quote: Do not override a specified rd

from_fact: specified rd could be overridden
specified rd is no longer overridden

subject: BGP AS_SET rejection default
old: disabled by default (AS_SET accepted)
new: enabled by default (AS_SET rejected)
truth: Stop relying on BGP accepting AS_SET by default; BGP now rejects AS_SET by default per RFC 9774.
quote: Until 10.5.0, it was disabled by default, and since RFC 9774 was published, we switched this on by default (to reject).

from_fact: disabled by default (as_set accepted)
enabled by default (as_set rejected)

subject: BGP Error handling for iBGP peers
old: malformed packets between iBGP peers always reset the session
new: malformed packets are handled the same way as for eBGP (withdrawing or discarding)
truth: Stop expecting iBGP session reset on malformed packets; iBGP now handles malformed packets by withdrawing or discarding them instead of resetting the session.
quote: Before 10.5.0, once we received a malformed packet between iBGP peers, we always reset the session, and with this release, we handle malformed packets the same way as for eBGP (by withdrawing or discarding the malformed packets).

from_fact: malformed packets between ibgp peers always reset the session
malformed packets are handled the same way as for ebgp (withdrawing or discarding)

subject: Zebra next hop weights width
old: 8-bit weights
new: 16-bit weights
truth: Stop assuming next hop weights are 8-bit; zebra now uses 16-bit weights for ECMP consistent hashing.
quote: The weights used in ECMP's consistent hashing have been widened from 8 bits to 16 bits since the 6.12 Linux kernel.

from_fact: 8-bit weights
16-bit weights

subject: bgp_bmp
old: BMP sends End-of-RIB by default
new: BMP does not send End-of-RIB by default
truth: BMP no longer sends End-of-RIB messages by default; you must explicitly enable this if needed.

from_fact: bmp sends end-of-rib by default
bmp does not send end-of-rib by default

old: BGP opens a listening port for VRF instances
new: BGP does not open a listening port for VRF instances

new: Soft-reconfiguration no longer stalls bestpath processing

old: Setting extcommunity link bandwidth value to zero was not allowed or had no effect

new: `copy config from file` now actually applies the config

new: BGP session will not start if BGP identifier is not set

new: IPv4 class E addresses (240.0.0.0/4) are now used as connected routes by default

new: V6 Router Advertisements are NOT sent anymore after interface up-down-up
